# Backend Structure & Function Registry
# Generated by: Engineer / Architect
# Consumed by: code-gen-role.md ONLY — Backend Generation
# DO NOT EDIT manually after code generation begins
# Project Folder: /freelanceflow/backend/

---

## 1. Tech Stack (Quick Reference)
- Runtime: Node.js 20 LTS
- Framework: Express 4.x
- Database: MongoDB + Mongoose (latest stable)
- Auth: JWT (jsonwebtoken) — 15m access token + Refresh Token rotation
- Test Framework: Jest + Supertest
- Language: JavaScript
- Email: Nodemailer
- PDF: pdfkit
- Cron: node-cron

---

## 2. All Packages

### Production Dependencies
| Package | Version | Import Name | Purpose |
|---------|---------|-------------|---------|
| express | ^4.18.2 | express | HTTP server framework |
| mongoose | ^8.0.0 | mongoose | MongoDB ODM |
| jsonwebtoken | ^9.0.0 | jsonwebtoken | JWT sign/verify |
| bcryptjs | ^2.4.3 | bcryptjs | Password hashing (12 rounds) |
| helmet | ^7.0.0 | helmet | Security headers — first middleware |
| cors | ^2.8.5 | cors | CORS middleware |
| express-rate-limit | ^7.0.0 | express-rate-limit | Rate limiting per route group |
| express-mongo-sanitize | ^2.2.0 | mongoSanitize | NoSQL injection prevention |
| xss-clean | ^0.1.4 | xss | XSS storage prevention |
| joi | ^17.11.0 | Joi | Request body validation |
| morgan | ^1.10.0 | morgan | HTTP request logging |
| nodemailer | ^6.9.7 | nodemailer | Email sending via SMTP |
| pdfkit | ^0.14.0 | PDFDocument | PDF generation for invoices |
| node-cron | ^3.0.3 | cron | Scheduled overdue invoice detection |
| dotenv | ^16.3.1 | dotenv | Environment variable loading |

### Dev Dependencies
| Package | Version | Import Name | Purpose |
|---------|---------|-------------|---------|
| jest | ^29.7.0 | jest | Test runner |
| supertest | ^6.3.3 | supertest | Integration test HTTP client |
| mongodb-memory-server | ^9.1.0 | MongoMemoryServer | In-memory MongoDB for tests |
| nodemon | ^3.0.2 | nodemon | Dev server auto-restart |

---

## 3. All Environment Variables
| Variable Name | Example Value | Used In File(s) | Required |
|---------------|---------------|-----------------|----------|
| PORT | 5000 | constants.js, server.js | yes |
| MONGODB_URI | mongodb://localhost:27017/freelanceflow | db.js | yes |
| JWT_SECRET | supersecretkey_minimum32chars | constants.js | yes |
| JWT_EXPIRES_IN | 15m | constants.js | yes |
| REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN | 7d | constants.js | yes |
| BCRYPT_SALT_ROUNDS | 12 | constants.js | yes |
| NODE_ENV | development | app.js, errorHandler.js | yes |
| CLIENT_URL | http://localhost:3000 | constants.js, app.js | yes |
| SMTP_HOST | smtp.gmail.com | emailService.js | yes |
| SMTP_PORT | 587 | emailService.js | yes |
| SMTP_USER | you@gmail.com | emailService.js | yes |
| SMTP_PASS | yourapppassword | emailService.js | yes |
| EMAIL_FROM | noreply@freelanceflow.com | emailService.js | yes |
| INVITE_TOKEN_EXPIRES_HOURS | 48 | constants.js | yes |
| EMAIL_VERIFICATION_EXPIRES_HOURS | 24 | constants.js | yes |
| PASSWORD_RESET_EXPIRES_HOURS | 1 | constants.js | yes |

## 5. File Registry

### FILE: src/config/db.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Connect to MongoDB using MONGODB_URI env variable
- **Imports From:** mongoose, constants.js (MONGODB_URI), logger.js
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | connectDB | async function | Establishes Mongoose connection; logs success or calls process.exit(1) on failure |
- **Env Vars Used:** MONGODB_URI (via constants.js)
- **Notes:** Called in server.js before app.listen()

---

### FILE: src/config/constants.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Central store for all app-wide constants — only file that reads process.env
- **Imports From:** dotenv (calls dotenv.config() at top of file)
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Value / Purpose |
  |-------------|------|-----------------|
  | PORT | number | process.env.PORT or 5000 |
  | MONGODB_URI | string | process.env.MONGODB_URI |
  | JWT_SECRET | string | process.env.JWT_SECRET |
  | JWT_EXPIRES_IN | string | process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN or "15m" |
  | REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN | string | process.env.REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN or "7d" |
  | BCRYPT_SALT_ROUNDS | number | parseInt(process.env.BCRYPT_SALT_ROUNDS) or 12 |
  | NODE_ENV | string | process.env.NODE_ENV or "development" |
  | CLIENT_URL | string | process.env.CLIENT_URL or "http://localhost:3000" |
  | SMTP_HOST | string | process.env.SMTP_HOST |
  | SMTP_PORT | number | parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT) or 587 |
  | SMTP_USER | string | process.env.SMTP_USER |
  | SMTP_PASS | string | process.env.SMTP_PASS |
  | EMAIL_FROM | string | process.env.EMAIL_FROM |
  | INVITE_TOKEN_EXPIRES_HOURS | number | parseInt(process.env.INVITE_TOKEN_EXPIRES_HOURS) or 48 |
  | EMAIL_VERIFICATION_EXPIRES_HOURS | number | 24 |
  | PASSWORD_RESET_EXPIRES_HOURS | number | 1 |
- **Notes:** Every other file imports constants from here — never from process.env directly

---

### FILE: src/models/User.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Mongoose schema and model for User entity (freelancer and client roles)
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | name | String | yes | — | min:2, max:50, trim |
  | email | String | yes | — | unique, lowercase, trim |
  | passwordHash | String | yes | — | minlength:60 |
  | role | String | yes | "freelancer" | enum:[freelancer, client] |
  | isEmailVerified | Boolean | yes | false | — |
  | emailVerificationToken | String | no | null | — |
  | emailVerificationExpires | Date | no | null | — |
  | passwordResetToken | String | no | null | — |
  | passwordResetExpires | Date | no | null | — |
  | clientId | ObjectId | no | null | ref:Client — only when role=client |
  | freelancerId | ObjectId | no | null | ref:User — owner freelancer, only when role=client |
  | company | String | no | "" | max:100 |
  | notificationPreferences | Object | yes | {emailOnInvoiceView:true, emailOnPaymentReceived:true, overdueInvoiceAlerts:true, emailOnTimeLogs:true} | all booleans |
  | timestamps | auto | — | — | createdAt, updatedAt |
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | User | Mongoose Model | Default export |
- **Notes:** passwordHash is always hashed — plain password never stored

---

### FILE: src/models/RefreshToken.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Schema for refresh token rotation storage
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | userId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User, indexed |
  | tokenHash | String | yes | — | unique — SHA-256 of raw token |
  | expiresAt | Date | yes | — | TTL index — auto-expires in MongoDB |
  | isRevoked | Boolean | yes | false | — |
  | timestamps | auto | — | — | createdAt only |
- **Indexes:** TTL on expiresAt; unique on tokenHash; index on userId
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | RefreshToken | Mongoose Model | Default export |

---

### FILE: src/models/Client.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Mongoose schema for Client entity
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | freelancerId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User, indexed |
  | name | String | yes | — | min:2, max:100, trim |
  | company | String | no | "" | max:100 |
  | email | String | yes | — | lowercase, trim |
  | phone | String | no | "" | — |
  | notes | String | no | "" | max:500 |
  | status | String | yes | "Active" | enum:[Active, Archived] |
  | timestamps | auto | — | — | createdAt, updatedAt |
- **Indexes:** compound unique on { freelancerId, email }; index on status; index on freelancerId
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | Client | Mongoose Model | Default export |

---

### FILE: src/models/InviteToken.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Schema for client portal invite tokens
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | clientId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:Client, indexed |
  | freelancerId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User, indexed |
  | tokenHash | String | yes | — | unique — SHA-256 of raw token |
  | expiresAt | Date | yes | — | 48h TTL index |
  | status | String | yes | "Active" | enum:[Active, Expired, Redeemed] |
  | timestamps | auto | — | — | createdAt |
- **Indexes:** TTL on expiresAt; unique on tokenHash
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | InviteToken | Mongoose Model | Default export |

---

### FILE: src/models/Project.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Mongoose schema for Project entity
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | freelancerId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User, indexed |
  | clientId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:Client, indexed |
  | name | String | yes | — | min:2, max:100, trim |
  | description | String | no | "" | max:500 |
  | status | String | yes | "Draft" | enum:[Active, Draft, OnHold, Completed, Archived] |
  | startDate | Date | no | null | — |
  | deadline | Date | no | null | must be > startDate (service-layer validation) |
  | budget | Mongoose.Decimal128 | no | null | min:0 |
  | hourlyRate | Mongoose.Decimal128 | no | null | min:0 |
  | timestamps | auto | — | — | createdAt, updatedAt |
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | Project | Mongoose Model | Default export |
- **Notes:** Projects are never deleted — only archived (audit requirement from BA)

---

### FILE: src/models/TimeLog.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Mongoose schema for TimeLog entity
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | freelancerId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User, indexed |
  | projectId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:Project, indexed |
  | date | Date | yes | — | cannot be future (service-layer validation) |
  | hours | Number | yes | — | min:0, max:23, integer |
  | minutes | Number | yes | — | min:0, max:59, integer |
  | description | String | no | "" | max:500 |
  | status | String | yes | "Active" | enum:[Active, Locked] |
  | invoiceId | ObjectId | no | null | ref:Invoice — set when locked |
  | timestamps | auto | — | — | createdAt, updatedAt |
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | TimeLog | Mongoose Model | Default export |

---

### FILE: src/models/Invoice.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Mongoose schema for Invoice entity
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | freelancerId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User, indexed |
  | clientId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:Client, indexed |
  | projectId | ObjectId | no | null | ref:Project, indexed |
  | invoiceNumber | String | yes | — | compound unique: {freelancerId, invoiceNumber} |
  | status | String | yes | "Draft" | enum:[Draft, Sent, Viewed, PartiallyPaid, Paid, Overdue] |
  | issueDate | Date | yes | — | — |
  | dueDate | Date | yes | — | must be after issueDate |
  | taxPercent | Mongoose.Decimal128 | yes | 0 | min:0, max:100 |
  | subtotal | Mongoose.Decimal128 | yes | 0 | computed server-side |
  | totalAmount | Mongoose.Decimal128 | yes | 0 | computed: subtotal*(1+taxPercent/100) |
  | notes | String | no | "" | max:1000 |
  | timestamps | auto | — | — | createdAt, updatedAt |
- **Indexes:** compound unique on {freelancerId, invoiceNumber}; index on status; index on dueDate; index on freelancerId+clientId
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | Invoice | Mongoose Model | Default export |

---

### FILE: src/models/InvoiceLineItem.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Mongoose schema for invoice line items
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | invoiceId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:Invoice, indexed |
  | description | String | yes | — | min:1, max:200, trim |
  | quantity | Mongoose.Decimal128 | yes | — | min:0.01 |
  | rate | Mongoose.Decimal128 | yes | — | min:0 |
  | total | Mongoose.Decimal128 | yes | — | computed: quantity*rate — set server-side only |
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | InvoiceLineItem | Mongoose Model | Default export |

---

### FILE: src/models/PaymentLedger.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Append-only payment records schema
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | invoiceId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:Invoice, indexed |
  | freelancerId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User, indexed |
  | amount | Mongoose.Decimal128 | yes | — | min:0.01 |
  | method | String | yes | "manual" | enum:[manual, bank_transfer, cash, cheque] |
  | notes | String | no | "" | max:500 |
  | recordedAt | Date | yes | Date.now | immutable — set only at creation |
  | recordedBy | String | yes | "freelancer" | enum:[freelancer, system] |
- **Notes:** NEVER use updateOne, findByIdAndUpdate, or deleteOne on this model — append-only enforced at service layer
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | PaymentLedger | Mongoose Model | Default export |

---

### FILE: src/models/AuditLog.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Immutable audit trail entry schema
- **Imports From:** mongoose
- **Schema Fields:**
  | Field | Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
  |-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
  | freelancerId | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User, indexed |
  | entityType | String | yes | — | enum:[Invoice, Payment, Client, TimeLog, InviteToken] |
  | entityId | String | yes | — | string ID of affected record |
  | action | String | yes | — | enum:[INVOICE_SENT, PAYMENT_RECORDED, CLIENT_INVITED, INVOICE_VIEWED, TIMELOG_LOCKED, INVITE_ACCEPTED] |
  | performedBy | ObjectId | yes | — | ref:User |
  | metadata | Mixed | no | {} | additional context JSON |
  | createdAt | Date | yes | Date.now | immutable — no updatedAt |
- **Schema Options:** { timestamps: false } — only createdAt set manually at creation
- **Notes:** NEVER use update or delete operations on this model — immutable by design
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | AuditLog | Mongoose Model | Default export |

---

### FILE: src/utils/response.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Standardized API response helper functions — every route must use these
- **Imports From:** constants.js (NODE_ENV)
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Params | Returns | Purpose |
  |-------------|--------|---------|---------|
  | successResponse | (res, statusCode, message, data={}) | void | Sends { success:true, message, data } |
  | errorResponse | (res, statusCode, message, error=null) | void | Sends { success:false, message, error: NODE_ENV==="development" ? error : undefined } |
- **Notes:** Never use res.json() directly in any route or service — always use these helpers

---

### FILE: src/utils/logger.js
- **Single Responsibility:** App-wide logger wrapper
- **Imports From:** none (wraps console)
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | logger | object | { info(msg), warn(msg), error(msg) } — console wrapper, upgradeable to winston |

---

### FILE: src/utils/tokenUtils.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Token generation, hashing, and JWT utilities
- **Imports From:** crypto (built-in), jsonwebtoken, constants.js
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Params | Returns | Purpose |
  |-------------|--------|---------|---------|
  | generateRandomToken | () | string (hex, 32 bytes) | Crypto-random token for invite/reset/verify links |
  | hashToken | (rawToken: string) | string | SHA-256 hash of raw token — used for DB storage |
  | signAccessToken | (payload: object) | string | Signs JWT with JWT_SECRET and JWT_EXPIRES_IN |
  | verifyAccessToken | (token: string) | object | Decodes JWT; throws JsonWebTokenError on failure |

---

### FILE: src/utils/invoiceCalculator.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Pure deterministic calculation functions for invoice totals
- **Imports From:** none
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Params | Returns | Purpose |
  |-------------|--------|---------|---------|
  | calculateLineItemTotal | (quantity: number, rate: number) | number | quantity * rate, rounded to 2dp |
  | calculateSubtotal | (lineItems: Array<{quantity, rate}>) | number | Sum of all line item totals |
  | calculateTotalAmount | (subtotal: number, taxPercent: number) | number | subtotal * (1 + taxPercent/100), rounded to 2dp |
  | calculateBalanceDue | (totalAmount: number, paymentsArray: Array<{amount}>) | number | totalAmount - sum(payments), rounded to 2dp |
  | determineInvoiceStatus | (totalAmount: number, paymentsSum: number, dueDate: Date, currentStatus: string) | string | Returns Paid | PartiallyPaid | Overdue | current — used after payment recorded |
- **Notes:** All arithmetic uses standard JS floats then rounds to 2dp. Decimal128 conversion done in service layer.

---

### FILE: src/middleware/auth.js
- **Single Responsibility:** JWT verification and role guard middleware
- **Imports From:** tokenUtils.js (verifyAccessToken), response.js
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Params | Behavior |
  |-------------|--------|----------|
  | protect | (req, res, next) | Extracts Bearer token from Authorization header. Calls verifyAccessToken(). Attaches req.user = {userId, email, role, clientId?, freelancerId?}. Returns 401 if missing or invalid. |
  | clientOnly | (req, res, next) | Checks req.user.role === "client". Returns 403 if not. Must run after protect. |
  | freelancerOnly | (req, res, next) | Checks req.user.role === "freelancer". Returns 403 if not. Must run after protect. |

---

### FILE: src/middleware/rateLimiter.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Rate limiter instances for all route groups
- **Imports From:** express-rate-limit
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Config | Purpose |
  |-------------|--------|---------|
  | loginRateLimiter | max:10, windowMs:15min, standardHeaders:true, legacyHeaders:false | POST /api/auth/login |
  | registerRateLimiter | max:5, windowMs:60min | POST /api/auth/register |
  | authRateLimiter | max:10, windowMs:15min | All other /api/auth/* routes |
  | globalRateLimiter | max:100, windowMs:15min | All other /api/* routes |
- **429 Response Body (all limiters):** { success: false, message: "Too many requests — please try again later" }

---

### FILE: src/middleware/validate.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Joi validation schemas and middleware factory for all request bodies
- **Imports From:** joi
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Validates | Applied To Route |
  |-------------|-----------|-----------------|
  | validateRegister | name(string,min:2,max:50,req), email(email,req), password(string,min:8,req) | POST /api/auth/register |
  | validateLogin | email(email,req), password(string,req) | POST /api/auth/login |
  | validateForgotPassword | email(email,req) | POST /api/auth/forgot-password |
  | validateResetPassword | token(string,req), newPassword(string,min:8,req) | POST /api/auth/reset-password |
  | validateCreateClient | name(req,min:2,max:100), company(opt,max:100), email(email,req), phone(opt), notes(opt,max:500) | POST /api/clients |
  | validateUpdateClient | same as createClient, all optional | PUT /api/clients/:id |
  | validateCreateProject | name(req,min:2,max:100), clientId(objectId,req), status(enum,opt), description(opt,max:500), startDate(iso,opt), deadline(iso,opt), budget(number,min:0,opt), hourlyRate(number,min:0,opt) | POST /api/projects |
  | validateUpdateProject | same as createProject, all optional | PUT /api/projects/:id |
  | validateCreateTimeLog | projectId(objectId,req), date(iso,req), hours(number,min:0,max:23,integer,req), minutes(number,min:0,max:59,integer,req), description(opt,max:500) | POST /api/time-logs |
  | validateUpdateTimeLog | same as createTimeLog, all optional | PUT /api/time-logs/:id |
  | validateCreateInvoice | clientId(objectId,req), projectId(objectId,opt), invoiceNumber(string,opt), issueDate(iso,req), dueDate(iso,req), lineItems(array,min:1,req each={description,quantity,rate}), taxPercent(number,min:0,max:100,opt), notes(opt,max:1000), timeLogIds(array objectId,opt) | POST /api/invoices |
  | validateUpdateInvoice | same as createInvoice, all optional | PUT /api/invoices/:id |
  | validateCreatePayment | amount(number,min:0.01,req), method(enum,opt), notes(opt) | POST /api/invoices/:id/payments |
  | validateUpdateSettings | name(opt), company(opt), notifications(object with boolean fields,opt) | PUT /api/settings |
- **Notes:** Each export is a middleware function. On failure: return errorResponse(res, 400, "Validation error", fieldErrors)

---

### FILE: src/middleware/errorHandler.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Global Express error handler — last middleware in app.js
- **Imports From:** response.js, logger.js
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Params | Behavior |
  |-------------|--------|----------|
  | errorHandler | (err, req, res, next) | Maps error type/code to HTTP status, calls errorResponse() |
- **Error Mappings:**
  | Error Type / Code | HTTP Status |
  |-------------------|-------------|
  | ValidationError (Mongoose) | 400 |
  | CastError (bad ObjectId) | 400 |
  | code 11000 (duplicate key) | 409 |
  | JsonWebTokenError | 401 |
  | TokenExpiredError | 401 |
  | AppError (custom class) | err.statusCode |
  | Default | 500 |
- **Notes:** Logs all 500 errors via logger.error(). Must be registered LAST in app.js.

---

### FILE: src/middleware/ownershipCheck.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Reusable ownership validation helpers for service functions
- **Imports From:** none (throws plain Error objects; AppError imported in service files)
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Params | Behavior |
  |-------------|--------|----------|
  | assertOwnership | (resource: MongooseDoc, userId: string) | Throws AppError(404,"Not found") if resource is null OR resource.freelancerId.toString() !== userId |
  | assertClientAccess | (resource: MongooseDoc, clientId: string) | Throws AppError(404,"Not found") if resource.clientId.toString() !== clientId |
- **Notes:** Always use 404, never 403 — prevents resource ID enumeration. Used in EVERY service function that operates on a user-owned resource.

---

### FILE: src/services/authService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** All authentication and session business logic
- **Imports From:** User.js, RefreshToken.js, InviteToken.js, Client.js, bcryptjs, tokenUtils.js, constants.js, emailService.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | registerUser | (name, email, password) | { userId, name, email } | 409 email exists | US-001 |
  | verifyEmail | (rawToken) | void | 400 invalid/expired | US-001 AC3 |
  | loginUser | (email, password) | { accessToken, refreshToken, user } | 401 invalid, 403 unverified | US-002 |
  | refreshTokens | (rawRefreshToken) | { accessToken, refreshToken } | 401 invalid/expired | US-002 |
  | logout | (userId, rawRefreshToken) | void | — | US-002 |
  | forgotPassword | (email) | void | — (always succeeds silently) | US-AUTH-02 |
  | resetPassword | (rawToken, newPassword) | void | 400 invalid/expired | US-AUTH-02 |
  | acceptClientInvite | (rawToken, password) | { accessToken, refreshToken, user } | 400 expired/redeemed | US-005 |
- **Business Rules:**
  | Rule | Source |
  |------|--------|
  | Password hashed with bcryptjs, 12 salt rounds | BA BR-01 |
  | isEmailVerified must be true before login allowed | US-001 AC3 |
  | Refresh token rotation: each use revokes old token and issues new one | US-002 |
  | Refresh tokens stored as SHA-256 hash in DB | EA-05 |
  | acceptClientInvite marks InviteToken.status = Redeemed | US-005 |
  | forgotPassword returns 200 even if email not found — prevents enumeration | EA-04 |

---

### FILE: src/services/clientService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Client CRUD and invite management
- **Imports From:** Client.js, InviteToken.js, AuditLog.js, tokenUtils.js, emailService.js, ownershipCheck.js, constants.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | getAllClients | (freelancerId, {search, status, page, limit}) | {clients, total, page} | — | US-004 |
  | createClient | (freelancerId, {name,company,email,phone,notes}) | client object | 409 duplicate email within freelancer | US-CLIENT-02 |
  | getClientById | (clientId, freelancerId) | full client object | 404 not found/owner | US-CLIENT-03 |
  | updateClient | (clientId, freelancerId, updates) | updated client | 404 not found/owner | US-CLIENT-02 |
  | archiveClient | (clientId, freelancerId) | {_id, status:"Archived"} | 404, 409 already archived | US-004 |
  | unarchiveClient | (clientId, freelancerId) | {_id, status:"Active"} | 404, 409 already active | US-CLIENT-03 |
  | inviteClient | (clientId, freelancerId) | {inviteToken, expiresAt} | 404, 409 active invite pending | US-005 |
- **Ownership Pattern:** Every function calls assertOwnership(resource, freelancerId) immediately after fetch

---

### FILE: src/services/projectService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Project lifecycle management
- **Imports From:** Project.js, Client.js, TimeLog.js, Invoice.js, PaymentLedger.js, ownershipCheck.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | getAllProjects | (freelancerId, {status,clientId,search,page,limit}) | {projects, total, page} | — | US-007 |
  | createProject | (freelancerId, {name,clientId,status,description,startDate,deadline,budget,hourlyRate}) | project object | 400 deadline<startDate, 404 clientId not owned | US-007 |
  | getProjectById | (projectId, freelancerId) | project + {totalHours, totalInvoiced, totalPaid, progressPercent} | 404 | US-PROJ-03 |
  | updateProject | (projectId, freelancerId, updates) | updated project | 400 archived, 404 not owner | US-007 |
  | archiveProject | (projectId, freelancerId) | {_id, status:"Archived"} | 404, 409 already archived | US-007 |
- **Business Rules:**
  | Rule | Source |
  |------|--------|
  | Projects cannot be deleted — only archived | BA audit requirement |
  | Archived projects cannot be updated | US-007 |
  | clientId must be owned by the requesting freelancer | ownership pattern |
  | progressPercent = (sumHours * hourlyRate / budget * 100) if both set, else 0 | EA-03 |

---

### FILE: src/services/timeLogService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Time log CRUD with lock enforcement
- **Imports From:** TimeLog.js, Project.js, ownershipCheck.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | getAllTimeLogs | (freelancerId, {projectId,search,startDate,endDate,page,limit}) | {timeLogs, total, totalHours, billableHours} | — | US-008 |
  | createTimeLog | (freelancerId, {projectId,date,hours,minutes,description}) | time log object | 400 future date, 400 zero duration, 404 project not owned | US-TIME-02 |
  | updateTimeLog | (timeLogId, freelancerId, updates) | updated time log | 400 locked, 404 not owner | US-008 |
  | deleteTimeLog | (timeLogId, freelancerId) | void | 400 locked, 404 not owner | US-008 |
  | lockTimeLogs | (timeLogIds: string[], invoiceId: string) | void | internal — called by invoiceService.sendInvoice() only | US-010 |
- **Business Rules:**
  | Rule | Source |
  |------|--------|
  | Cannot update or delete TimeLog where status === "Locked" | BA BR-03 |
  | date cannot be in the future | US-TIME-02 |
  | hours + minutes must total > 0 minutes | US-TIME-02 |
  | lockTimeLogs sets status = "Locked", invoiceId = invoiceId on all provided IDs | US-010 |

---

### FILE: src/services/invoiceService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Invoice creation, lifecycle transitions, PDF generation
- **Imports From:** Invoice.js, InvoiceLineItem.js, TimeLog.js, Client.js, Project.js, AuditLog.js, PaymentLedger.js, timeLogService.js (lockTimeLogs), emailService.js, pdfService.js, invoiceCalculator.js, ownershipCheck.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | getAllInvoices | (freelancerId, {status,clientId,search,page,limit}) | {invoices, total} | — | US-009 |
  | createInvoice | (freelancerId, {clientId,projectId,invoiceNumber,issueDate,dueDate,lineItems,taxPercent,notes,timeLogIds}) | invoice with computed totals | 400 locked timeLogs, 404 client/project, 409 dup invoiceNumber | US-009 |
  | getInvoiceById | (invoiceId, freelancerId) | invoice + lineItems + payments + balanceDue | 404 not owner | US-INV-02 |
  | updateInvoice | (invoiceId, freelancerId, updates) | updated invoice | 400 not Draft, 404 not owner | US-009 |
  | sendInvoice | (invoiceId, freelancerId) | {_id, status:"Sent"} | 400 not Draft, 404 not owner | US-010 |
  | generatePDF | (invoiceId, freelancerId) | Buffer (PDF bytes) | 404 not owner, 500 gen failure | US-014 |
  | runOverdueDetection | () | void | internal — called by cron job | US-013 |
- **Business Rules:**
  | Rule | Source |
  |------|--------|
  | Invoice totalAmount always computed via invoiceCalculator — never manually set | BA BR-07 |
  | Only Draft invoices can be updated (PUT) | BA BR-01 |
  | sendInvoice: (1) call lockTimeLogs(attachedTimeLogIds, invoiceId), (2) create AuditLog{action:INVOICE_SENT}, (3) call emailService.sendInvoiceEmail() | US-010 |
  | Auto-generate invoiceNumber if absent: "INV-" + (count of freelancer's invoices + 1), padded to 3 digits | EA-02 |
  | runOverdueDetection: updateMany where dueDate < now AND status in [Sent,Viewed,PartiallyPaid] → status = Overdue | US-013 |

---

### FILE: src/services/paymentService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Payment recording and invoice status recalculation
- **Imports From:** PaymentLedger.js, Invoice.js, AuditLog.js, invoiceCalculator.js, ownershipCheck.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | recordPayment | (invoiceId, freelancerId, {amount, method, notes}) | {payment, updatedInvoiceStatus} | 400 overpayment, 400 not payable, 404 not owner | US-012 |
- **Business Rules:**
  | Rule | Source |
  |------|--------|
  | Invoice must be in [Sent, Viewed, PartiallyPaid, Overdue] to accept payments | BA |
  | sum(existingPayments) + newAmount must be ≤ totalAmount — throw 400 "Overpayment" if exceeded | BA BR-04 |
  | PaymentLedger is append-only — only PaymentLedger.create() — never update or delete | BA BR-02 |
  | After creating payment: call determineInvoiceStatus() and update invoice.status | US-013 |
  | Create AuditLog { action: PAYMENT_RECORDED } | BA 3.3 |

---

### FILE: src/services/dashboardService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Dashboard metrics aggregation, all scoped to freelancerId
- **Imports From:** Invoice.js, Project.js, PaymentLedger.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | getMetrics | (freelancerId) | {totalEarningsThisMonth, earningsByMonth[{month,amount}], outstandingInvoicesCount, outstandingInvoicesTotal, overdueCount, activeProjectsCount, recentInvoices} | — | US-015 |
- **Notes:** earningsByMonth uses MongoDB aggregation: group PaymentLedger by month for current calendar year, sum amounts per month

---

### FILE: src/services/portalService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Client portal read-only access — strictly scoped to clientId + freelancerId
- **Imports From:** Invoice.js, InvoiceLineItem.js, PaymentLedger.js, Project.js, AuditLog.js, ownershipCheck.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | getClientInvoices | (clientId, freelancerId) | {invoices} | — | US-006 |
  | getClientInvoiceById | (invoiceId, clientId, freelancerId) | full invoice + triggers Viewed if first access | 404 not accessible | US-011 |
  | getClientProjects | (clientId, freelancerId) | {projects} | — | US-006 |
- **Business Rules:**
  | Rule | Source |
  |------|--------|
  | Every query filters by BOTH clientId AND freelancerId | BA 3.1 |
  | getClientInvoiceById: if invoice.status === "Sent" → update to "Viewed" + create AuditLog{action:INVOICE_VIEWED} | US-011 |

- **Single Responsibility:** User profile and notification preferences read/update
- **Imports From:** User.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | getSettings | (userId) | {profile:{name,email,company}, notifications} | 404 user not found | US-SET-01 |
  | updateSettings | (userId, {name,company,notifications}) | updated settings object | 404 user not found | US-SET-01 |

### FILE: src/services/auditService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Read-only access to audit log entries
- **Imports From:** AuditLog.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|--------|---------|
  | getAuditLogs | (freelancerId, {entityType,entityId,page,limit}) | {logs, total} | — | BA 3.3 |
- **Notes:** No create/update/delete in this service. Audit entries are created inline in other services.

### FILE: src/services/emailService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Send transactional emails via Nodemailer SMTP
- **Imports From:** nodemailer, constants.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Purpose |
  |----------|--------|---------|---------|
  | sendEmailVerification | (to, verificationUrl) | void | Sends email verification link — US-001 |
  | sendPasswordReset | (to, resetUrl) | void | Sends password reset link — US-AUTH-02 |
  | sendInvoiceEmail | (to, freelancerName, invoiceNumber, portalUrl) | void | Notifies client of sent invoice — US-010 |
  | sendInviteEmail | (to, freelancerName, inviteUrl) | void | Sends client portal invite — US-005 |
- **Notes:** All functions catch errors internally and call logger.error() — email failure does NOT throw to caller (graceful degradation)

---

### FILE: src/services/pdfService.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Generate PDF buffer for an invoice using pdfkit
- **Imports From:** pdfkit, invoiceCalculator.js
- **Exports:**
  | Function | Params | Returns | Throws | Maps To |
  |----------|--------|---------|---------|---------|
  | generateInvoicePDF | (invoiceData: {invoice, lineItems, payments, client, freelancer}) | Promise<Buffer> | 500 on generation error | US-014 |
- **Notes:** invoiceData is fully assembled by invoiceService.generatePDF() before calling this. PDF includes: header (freelancer + client info), line items table, subtotal/tax/total rows, payments summary, balance due.

### FILE: src/routes/authRoutes.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Auth endpoint route definitions
- **Imports From:** express, rateLimiter.js, validate.js, authService.js, response.js
- **Routes:**
  | Method | Path | Middleware | Service Call | Success Code |
  |--------|------|-----------|--------------|-------------|
  | POST | /api/auth/register | registerRateLimiter, validateRegister | authService.registerUser() | 201 |
  | POST | /api/auth/login | loginRateLimiter, validateLogin | authService.loginUser() | 200 |
  | POST | /api/auth/refresh | authRateLimiter | authService.refreshTokens() | 200 |
  | POST | /api/auth/logout | protect | authService.logout() | 200 |
  | POST | /api/auth/forgot-password | authRateLimiter, validateForgotPassword | authService.forgotPassword() | 200 |
  | POST | /api/auth/reset-password | authRateLimiter, validateResetPassword | authService.resetPassword() | 200 |
  | GET | /api/auth/verify-email | authRateLimiter | authService.verifyEmail() — token from query param | 200 |
  | POST | /api/auth/client-portal/accept | authRateLimiter | authService.acceptClientInvite() | 200 |

  | PATCH | /api/clients/:id/unarchive | protect | clientService.unarchiveClient() | 200 |

### FILE: src/app.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Express app setup and middleware registration in correct order
- **Imports From:** express, helmet, cors, morgan, express-mongo-sanitize, xss-clean, rateLimiter.js, authRoutes.js, clientRoutes.js, projectRoutes.js, timeLogRoutes.js, invoiceRoutes.js, dashboardRoutes.js, auditRoutes.js, settingsRoutes.js, portalRoutes.js, errorHandler.js, response.js, constants.js (CLIENT_URL, NODE_ENV)
- **Middleware Registration Order:**
  1. helmet()
  2. cors({ origin: CLIENT_URL, credentials: true })
  3. express.json({ limit: "10kb" })
  4. mongoSanitize()
  5. xss()
  6. morgan("dev") — only if NODE_ENV !== "test"
  7. authRateLimiter — applied to /api/auth/* separately in route mounts
  8. globalRateLimiter — applied to all /api/* routes
  9. Mount: /api/auth → authRoutes
  10. Mount: /api/clients → clientRoutes
  11. Mount: /api/projects → projectRoutes
  12. Mount: /api/time-logs → timeLogRoutes
  13. Mount: /api/invoices → invoiceRoutes
  14. Mount: /api/dashboard → dashboardRoutes
  15. Mount: /api/audit-logs → auditRoutes
  16. Mount: /api/settings → settingsRoutes
  17. Mount: /api/portal → portalRoutes
  18. 404 handler: (req, res) => errorResponse(res, 404, "Route not found")
  19. errorHandler (MUST be last)
- **Exports:** app (Express instance)

---

### FILE: src/server.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Start HTTP server after DB connects and cron jobs initialize
- **Imports From:** app.js, db.js (connectDB), constants.js (PORT), overdueDetectionJob.js, logger.js
- **Startup Sequence:**
  1. Call connectDB()
  2. On success: app.listen(PORT, () => logger.info(...))
  3. Initialize overdueDetectionJob
  4. On DB failure: process.exit(1)
- **Exports:** none (entry point)

---

### FILE: src/jobs/overdueDetectionJob.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Scheduled cron job to flag overdue invoices daily
- **Imports From:** node-cron, invoiceService.js (runOverdueDetection), logger.js
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | initOverdueJob | function | Schedules cron.schedule("5 0 * * *", runOverdueDetection) — runs at 00:05 UTC daily |
- **Notes:** Called in server.js after app.listen()

---

### FILE: tests/helpers/testDb.js
- **Single Responsibility:** In-memory MongoDB setup/teardown for tests
- **Imports From:** mongodb-memory-server, mongoose
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Type | Purpose |
  |-------------|------|---------|
  | connectTestDb | async function | Starts MongoMemoryServer and connects Mongoose |
  | closeTestDb | async function | Drops DB and closes connection |
  | clearTestDb | async function | Clears all collections between tests |

---

### FILE: tests/helpers/testFactories.js
- **Single Responsibility:** Factory functions for creating test fixtures
- **Imports From:** User.js, Client.js, Project.js, Invoice.js, TimeLog.js, bcryptjs
- **Exports:**
  | Export Name | Params | Returns | Purpose |
  |-------------|--------|---------|---------|
  | createTestUser | (overrides={}) | User document | Creates a verified freelancer user |
  | createTestClient | (freelancerId, overrides={}) | Client document | Creates a client for a freelancer |
  | createTestProject | (freelancerId, clientId, overrides={}) | Project document | Creates a project |
  | createTestInvoice | (freelancerId, clientId, overrides={}) | Invoice + lineItems | Creates a draft invoice |
  | createTestTimeLog | (freelancerId, projectId, overrides={}) | TimeLog document | Creates an active time log |

---

## 7. Assumptions Locked
| ID | Decision Made | Rationale |
|----|---------------|-----------|
| EA-01 | Single currency USD — Decimal128 for all monetary fields | pm-output.md A1: USD only |
| EA-02 | Invoice number: "INV-" + padded sequential integer per freelancer, auto-generated if absent | Resolves Q1 from pm-output.md |
| EA-03 | Progress % = (hoursLogged * hourlyRate / budget * 100); 0 if either unset | EA choice for MVP |
| EA-04 | Email not found on forgotPassword still returns 200 | Prevents email enumeration |
| EA-05 | Refresh tokens stored as SHA-256 hash | DB compromise protection |
| EA-06 | Overdue detection runs at 00:05 UTC daily via cron — not real-time | Acceptable for MVP |
| EA-07 | PDF generated via pdfkit (programmatic) — not headless browser | Avoids puppeteer complexity |
| EA-08 | Payment methods: manual, bank_transfer, cash, cheque — no gateway | Out of scope per pm-output.md |
| EA-09 | Client portal user = separate User record (role=client) linked to Client document | Required for JWT-based portal auth |
| EA-10 | Duplicate client email: allowed across different freelancers, unique only within same freelancer | Resolves Q2 from pm-output.md |
| EA-11 | Tax = flat % on subtotal — no per-line-item tax | Resolves Q3 for MVP |
| EA-12 | billableHours in getAllTimeLogs = hours from Active (not Locked) logs | Logical definition for billing |
